economic_notes: Investments in Deh Tai Limited Partnership (road construction, commercial/residential rentals, geothermal development), FNFN Forestry Limited Partnership, Waterways Communications Limited Partnership (communications for resource companies in Horn River Basin), 672465 B.C. Ltd. (dissolved Oct 30, 2020). COVID-19 impacted operations including school and health centre closures, staff layoffs.
notes: Fiscal year 2021 (ended March 31, 2021). Consolidated entities include Liard Hotsprings Lodge (FNFN) Ltd., Fort Nelson Indian Band Land Trust Society, and Reaching For Our Vision Trust. Six entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs): 672465 B.C. Ltd. (dissolved Oct 2020), Deh Tai GP Ltd., Deh Tai Limited Partnership, FNFN Forestry Limited Partnership, Waterways Communication Limited Partnership, Waterways Communication Inc. (inactive). Large deficit of $8.8M vs budget deficit of $1.2M primarily driven by Administration expenses of $10.6M vs budget $2.6M and Other Investments expenses of $2.7M. Funds held in trust (Ottawa Trust) total $9,649,328. Portfolio investments include publicly traded securities at market value of $11,963,648 plus portfolio investments held in trust of $12,940,285. Designated funds of $2,914,073 restricted for capital projects. COVID-19 impacts noted. Balance sheet detail for current liabilities, deferred revenue, long-term debt, and tangible capital assets not fully extractable from provided text.
